use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and authentication flows
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with shadcn/ui patterns featuring multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Uses CVA for type-safe variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition. Includes proper accessibility support with focus rings and disabled states. Designed for flexible integration across authentication, forms, and UI action triggers.
